test_framework: pytest with pytest-cov, fixtures in tests/conftest.py
verification_instructions: Run pytest with coverage, ensure >= 90% and all tests pass
setup_instructions: export PYENV_VERSION=3.12.13, pip install pytest pytest-cov pyyaml
environment_constraints: Use PYENV_VERSION=3.12.13 for all commands. No external network needed.
contribution_requirements: Tests must pass, coverage >= 90%, commit after each round
key_patterns: Kernel modules in kernel/, tests in tests/test_*.py, knowledge store in knowledge/store.py, memory state in memory/state_manager.py. Each module has matching test file. YAML configs, JSONL for append-only logs.
directory_structure: Root: runner.py, kernel/ (core logic), knowledge/ (skills/rules/patterns), memory/ (state_manager), tests/ (all test files)
